answer_en:
Bulbospongiosus m.
Stabilizes the perineal body
Compresses the bulb of the penis (to help maintain penile erection)
Assists in expulsion of semen during ejaculation
Helps empty the urethra of urine after the urinary bladder has emptied

details: Compresses the bulb of the penis (to help maintain penile erection)

title: Inferior View of Male* Perineum
